name: Reversible Beetle
name_jp: リバーシブル・ビートル
desc:
FLIP: Shuffle this card, and any face-up monsters in its column, into the Deck(s).
If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Change this card, and any monsters in its column, to face-down Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Reversible Beetle" once per turn.
mnst_eff:

sets.set: Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

action: Returns from field to Extra Deck
